subcodes.first_line: The servant in attendance hath been bidden to be brief in mentioning the righteous ones, by God, the Almighty, the All-Choosing, for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الخادم قد امر بالاختصار فی ذکر الاخیار من لدی الله المقتدر المختار لان
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @predictions and prophecies, @exhortations and counsels
